title: Extract URLs From Model Output
description: Extract all HTTP(S) URLs from a block of text, e.g. citations returned by a research agent.
problem: Write extract_urls(text) returning a list of all http:// or https:// URLs found in text, in order of appearance, without trailing punctuation like '.' or ')'.
starter_code:
import re

def extract_urls(text):
    # Find all http(s) URLs, stripping trailing punctuation
    return []
hint: Pattern: r'https?://[^\s)]+' then rstrip each match of '.,)'.
